name: Irish Coffee Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the yolks from the whites of eggs.
2. In a bowl, cream together with yolks and sugar until smooth.
3. Heat the coffee until hot but not boiling: add the gelatine and dissolve it in the coffee.
4. Add this mixture to the yolks and sugar; beat well.
5. Put the bowl over a pot of boiling water and continue beating until the mixture begins to thicken.
6. Remove from heat, allow cooling slightly, then place over cracked ice and continue stirring.
7. When the mixture is on the point of setting, whip the cream and fold it in.
8. Add the whiskey or Irish Mist.
9. Lastly, gently fold in the well-beaten egg whites.
10. Pour into a souffle dish lined with double layers of parchment paper (up to 3 inches above the top).
11. Oil a jar or bottle; press down into the center of the pudding.
12. Leave to set completely.
13. Remove the paper collar by easing around the circumference with a knife dipped in hot water.
14. Carefully remove the jar or bottle, filling the center with whipped cream sweetened with 1 tsp granulated sugar.
15. Decorate exposed sides with crushed walnuts pressed on gently.
